<!--
Thanks for contributing to warmbly-go!
Please fill out the sections below. Pull request titles should use a
conventional commit style (e.g. "feat: add campaign pause endpoint").
-->

## Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal change (no functional change)
- [ ] Build, CI, or tooling change

## How tested

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how reviewers can reproduce them. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover the change
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where relevant
- [ ] `gofmt` has been run on all changed files
- [ ] `golangci-lint` passes locally
- [ ] Commits use a conventional commit style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies have been added (standard library only)
